case_title: MOORE, GERDA K. VS GALLAGHER, PETER C/O BMW OF SF et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MOORE, GERDA K. AS TO DEFENDANT GALLAGHER, PETER C/O BMW OF SF HEIN, DAREK C/O BMW OF SF MACIEL, RAMON C/O BMW OF SF SCHMITT, HENRY OWNER & DBA BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLTF'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL.
CERT MAIL TO DAREK HEIN SALES REPRESENTATIVE BMW OF S.F RETURNED SIGNED.
DEFENDANTS REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, COURT DATE REQUESTED IS JAN.30,1997 8:30 AM. FEE PAID $10.00.
FOLDER SENT TO SUE KAPLAN FOR ORDER.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-15-1997, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-30-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS: IT IS ORDERED THAT THE APPLICATION IS GRANT -ED IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED BY SUE M. KAPLAN(COMM)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOORE, GERDA K. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GALLAGHER, PETER C/O BMW OF SF HEIN, DAREK C/O BMW OF SF MACIEL, RAMON C/O BMW OF SF SCHMITT, HENRY OWNER & DBA BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED PER COMMISSIONER KAPLAN. ORDER SENT TO PLFT AND DEFT.
